narrative:
Fremont City has 10,065 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
